acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 1
acceptance_constraints.text: The system must protect member and reward transactions with appropriate security controls.

acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 2
acceptance_constraints.text: The member-facing experience must remain usable on common digital channels.

acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 3
acceptance_constraints.text: The platform must support integrations with external systems such as payment confirmation and reporting sources.

acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 4
acceptance_constraints.text: The system must allow customers to enroll in the loyalty program digitally.

acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 5
acceptance_constraints.text: The system must show point balance and available rewards to eligible members.

acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 6
acceptance_constraints.text: The system must allow members to redeem rewards when eligibility conditions are satisfied.

acceptance_constraints.name: Acceptance Constraint 7
acceptance_constraints.text: The system must provide reporting on redemptions and campaign performance.

acceptance_constraints.name: Success Criterion 2
acceptance_constraints.text: Operations managers can update the reward catalog without engineering support for routine changes.

domain_invariants.name: Rule 1
domain_invariants.text: A Redemption must not be fulfilled unless reward eligibility and available points are confirmed.

domain_invariants.name: Rule 2
domain_invariants.text: A Reward Catalog Entry must be validated before it becomes Published.

domain_invariants.name: Rule 3
domain_invariants.text: A Member must provide the required details and consents before enrollment completes.

forbidden_transitions.name: Forbidden Transition 1
forbidden_transitions.text: A Redemption must not be fulfilled unless reward eligibility and available points are confirmed.

functional_requirements.text: The system must allow operations managers to maintain reward catalog entries and campaign rules.
The platform must integrate with payment confirmation and downstream reporting sources.

guard_conditions.name: Guard Condition 2
guard_conditions.text: Catalog validation approval is required before a reward becomes Published

non_functional_requirements.text: The system must protect member and reward transactions with appropriate security controls.
The member-facing experience must remain usable on common digital channels.
The platform must support integrations with external systems such as payment confirmation and reporting sources.
The system must allow customers to enroll in the loyalty program digitally.
The system must show point balance and available rewards to eligible members.
The system must allow members to redeem rewards when eligibility conditions are satisfied.
The system must provide reporting on redemptions and campaign performance.

scenarios.name: Invalid Catalog Change
scenarios.text: Publication is rejected because the new reward configuration would break an active offer.

scenarios.name: Missing Payment Confirmation
scenarios.text: Redemption pauses until dependent payment confirmation arrives.

scenarios.name: Reporting Delay
scenarios.text: Analytics view is partial because a reporting source is delayed.

scenarios.name: Reward Inventory Exhausted
scenarios.text: Redemption fails because no reward inventory remains.

state_invariants.name: Rule 1
state_invariants.text: A Redemption must not be fulfilled unless reward eligibility and available points are confirmed.

state_invariants.name: Rule 2
state_invariants.text: A Reward Catalog Entry must be validated before it becomes Published.

state_transitions.text: Reward Catalog Entry: Draft -> Published -> Retired
Reward Catalog Entry: Draft -> Published -> Retired

use_case_steps.name: Browse Rewards
use_case_steps.text: Catalog view degrades if an integration is temporarily unavailable.

use_case_steps.name: Browse Rewards
use_case_steps.text: Customer opens the rewards catalog.

use_case_steps.name: Browse Rewards
use_case_steps.text: System displays available rewards and points balance.

use_case_steps.name: Browse Rewards
use_case_steps.text: Customer filters or sorts the catalog.

use_case_steps.name: Enroll Member
use_case_steps.text: Enrollment is blocked when required consent is missing.

use_case_steps.name: Enroll Member
use_case_steps.text: Customer opens the loyalty enrollment flow.

use_case_steps.name: Enroll Member
use_case_steps.text: Customer provides the required details and consents.

use_case_steps.name: Enroll Member
use_case_steps.text: System validates the submission and creates the member account.

use_case_steps.name: Manage Reward Catalog
use_case_steps.text: A change is rejected because it would make an active reward invalid.

use_case_steps.name: Manage Reward Catalog
use_case_steps.text: Operations Manager opens catalog administration.

use_case_steps.name: Manage Reward Catalog
use_case_steps.text: Operations Manager updates reward configuration.

use_case_steps.name: Manage Reward Catalog
use_case_steps.text: System validates and publishes the change.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: Reward inventory is exhausted before completion.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: Customer does not have enough points.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: Payment confirmation is missing for a reward that depends on purchase completion.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: Customer selects a reward.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: System validates reward eligibility and available points.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: System reserves the reward and updates the member balance.

use_case_steps.name: Redeem Reward
use_case_steps.text: System confirms redemption to the customer.

use_case_steps.name: Review Redemption Analytics
use_case_steps.text: A reporting data source is delayed.

use_case_steps.name: Review Redemption Analytics
use_case_steps.text: Operations Manager opens the analytics dashboard.

use_case_steps.name: Review Redemption Analytics
use_case_steps.text: System shows redemption and campaign metrics.
